title: Sans Totem Of Undying
description: This Resource Pack Will transform Your Minecraft Totem Into Sans From Undertale!!
body:
# Explanation
This Mod Is Going to Make your Minecraft Totem of Undying into Sans From Undertale!!

## Note to You
Every available Version that you can Download is Compatible with every Minecraft Version.


### _Animation of the Totem:_

<iframe width="25" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/FXUjdXuVylI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

(There Are two Versions Available, one that is Animated and the Other one that Isn't).

### Made By _Clokit_
